title: Wild Survival
description: Wild Survival is a monster-free, realistic wilderness modpack focused on harsh survival, natural progression, seasons, nutrition, and environmental dangers - offering a calm but challenging life-in-the-wild experience.
body:
# 🌲 **Wild Survival** 🌲

Forget the Ender Dragon. **Wild Survival** is a monster-free, nature-driven **survival** modpack where the real enemy is the **wilderness** itself. Explore overhauled forests, rivers, mountains and diverse biomes filled only with wild animals behaving naturally 🦌🐻.

🌦️ **Seasons** change, **temperatures** drop and rise, **food** rots, caves can collapse, and your character’s **body parts**, **nutrition**, **hydration** and stamina all matter. Every choice has weight. Every day is a struggle.

You won’t punch trees here — the progression is fully reworked, early-game is slow and gritty, and mastering the environment becomes your true objective. Build functional shelters, forage and hunt realistically, cook with depth, manage injuries, and adapt to a living world that doesn’t care if you survive.

🛶 Whether you’re crossing rivers, exploring revamped caves, managing complex farming, or just trying to make it through the winter… **Wild Survival** delivers an immersive, harsh and rewarding survival journey like no other.

⚒️ **Realism. Immersion. Nature. Survival**.
**If you want a calm yet challenging experience where every decision matters, this is the wilderness calling.**
